Class Intake

java.lang.Object
org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.subsystems.Intake
public class Intake extends Object
Deprecated.
No longer relevant
A class for the intake system in the 2024-2025 season "Into the Deep"
Author:
Sunny-19-19
